'''Greni''' was a [[Wing Commander/Legends|Wing Commander]] in the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|Combined Defense Forces of the New Republic]] during the [[Thrawn campaign]]. She was the commanding officer of [[Gold Squadron (New Republic)|Gold Squadron]]. Both Wing Commander Greni and her wingman [[Bross]] were shot down during a [[Battle of Hettsk|battle]] over [[Hettsk]], which was located in the [[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Borderland Regions]]. The two pilots were captured by invading [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces and subsequently [[Mission to Hettsk|rescued]] by the [[Katarn Commandos]].

==Appearances==
